person

Rick Valassi

A reporter and broadcaster who remains on the air after the events of the first game.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Continuing broadcast

Valassi represents the continuing media voice that survives beyond the first New York crisis, although this overview does not yet catalog his individual broadcasts. [1]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    The official story recap describes Rick Valassi as a reporter and broadcaster. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Following the events of The Division, Valassi remains active and continues broadcasting. [1]

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: Broadcast-by-broadcast coverage belongs to the collectible intake and speaker-review workflow.
